text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: That's more like it!
Wooooo!

Narita Brian wins the autumn Tenno Sho. The
moment she does, the spectators all raise their
hands and erupt into applause.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Haha...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We've reached the deciding moments of the
autumn Tenno Sho! Narita Brian is still in it on the
final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Go, Brian!
Come on, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Will her legs give out? Or...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(No matter how hard I try to ignore it, I can't
shake the thunderous noise of this wind.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
(My back is hot, my legs are heavy, and the cold
wind is piercing my throat... I can barely stand the
pain.)

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: But, still...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: These legs of mine can still move!
Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Phew.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Thanks...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Ah, Brian!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks for the great race! I thought today
would be the day, but...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You were always up ahead, out of reach. Then,
before I knew it, it was over.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...But then again, this is what usually happens.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: But I'll catch up for sure next time! With... um...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: "The intent to crush you," I think it was?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hah! Say it like you mean it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Do it. If you've got the guts, come at me with
everything you've got!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I will!

The results of the autumn Tenno Sho spread
across the world in a flurry.

No one can take their eyes off Narita Brian.
They're all convinced that she can beat anyone.

And that would include her decorated sister, Biwa
Hayahide, if they ever competed against each
other.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...A sisterly showdown, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Reporters say some interesting things sometimes.
If I were to face my sister as I am now...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Yeah... If only I could...

Her face suddenly falls. In truth, there's
something else in the news that's weighing on her
mind.
"Hayahide has yet to return to racing."

"A year has already passed since the injury. Could
she be aiming for the Dream Trophy after the
holidays, or perhaps—"

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Trainer. Put that article away.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
There's someone waiting for me at the Japan Cup.
The Queen of the Amazons, Hishi Amazon.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: It's best to focus on that. Right?

We move on to talk about our next goal, the
Japan Cup, abandoning all talk of Biwa Hayahide
for the time being.
